summary: Iteration 11: Frontend testing for emoji→Ionicons replacement and ambient sounds. All emojis successfully replaced with Ionicons on all tested pages. FIXED a bug on rituals.tsx where moon phase icons were rendering as text instead of icons. CRITICAL: Ambient sounds are NOT working - Pixabay CDN URLs return 403 Forbidden errors.

integration_issues.issue: All 6 ambient sounds (Pluie, Feu, Forêt, Vagues, Vent, Nuit) fail to play - Pixabay CDN URLs return 403 Forbidden
integration_issues.error_message: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403, NotSupportedError: Failed to load because no supported source was found

action_items: CRITICAL: Replace Pixabay CDN sound URLs with working alternatives - the current URLs return 403 errors and sounds cannot play
Options: 1) Host sound files locally on backend/static, 2) Use Archive.org public domain sounds, 3) Use GitHub-hosted raw audio files, 4) Embed from a service that allows hotlinking
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: rituals.tsx line 336 was rendering phase.icon as Text instead of using Ionicons component - changed to <Ionicons name={phase.icon} />
All pages now correctly use Ionicons instead of emojis: mood selector, home menu, ambient page, progress page, gratitude page, rituals page, prompts page
updated_files: /app/frontend/app/rituals.tsx - Fixed moon phase icons to use Ionicons instead of text rendering

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All UI renders correctly but ambient sounds broken

context_for_next_testing_agent: Emoji→Ionicons migration complete. Rituals page bug fixed. Ambient sounds CRITICAL bug: Pixabay URLs return 403. Need to replace with working audio URLs.

mood_selector_icons.details: All 12 moods display Ionicons: Serein(leaf), Joyeux(sunny), Rêveur(cloud), Mélancolique(rainy), Fatigué(moon), Inspiré(sparkles), Anxieux(water), Nostalgique(time), Perdu(compass), Reconnaissant(heart), Contemplatif(eye), Éveillé(flash)

home_page_icons.details: All menu items use Ionicons: Moon phase card, theme toggle, Cadence(infinite), Gratitudes(heart-circle), Sommeil(bed), Progression(trending-up), Ambiance(musical-notes), Prompts(help-circle), etc.

ambient_page_icons.details: All 6 sound cards display correct Ionicons: Pluie(rainy), Feu(flame), Forêt(leaf), Vagues(water), Vent(cloudy), Nuit(moon)

ambient_sounds_playback.details: CRITICAL: All sound URLs return 403 Forbidden. Console shows 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403'

progress_page_icons.details: Streak icon(flame), mood distribution uses Ionicons for each mood type

gratitude_page_icons.details: Heart-outline icon displayed at top instead of 🙏 emoji

rituals_page_icons.details: Moon phase selector now shows actual moon icons instead of 'moon-outline' text. Fix applied to use <Ionicons> component

prompts_page_icons.details: Category icons use Ionicons: Introspection(eye), Gratitude(heart), Rêves(sparkles), Relations(people), Croissance(leaf)

console_warnings_observed: [expo-av]: Expo AV has been deprecated and will be removed in SDK 54
CRITICAL: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 (ambient sounds)

bug_fixed.issue: Moon phase selector was displaying icon names as text (e.g., 'moon-outline') instead of actual icons
